plastic_bottle.label: Plastic Bottles (PET / HDPE)
plastic_bottle.tips: Rinse out and squash flat. Leave lids on.

plastic_black.label: Black Plastic
plastic_black.tips: Black plastic cannot be sorted by recycling machinery. Put it in the black bin.

plastic_bag.label: Plastic Bags & Film
plastic_bag.tips: Some supermarkets (Tesco, Sainsbury's) have soft plastic collection points.

polystyrene.label: Polystyrene
polystyrene.tips: Not accepted in Portsmouth green bins.

glass_bottle.label: Glass Bottles & Jars
glass_bottle.tips: Rinse clean. Lids can go in the green bin separately.

glass_other.label: Non-bottle Glass (Pyrex, Ceramics, Drinking Glasses)
glass_other.tips: Different composition to bottle glass - cannot go in the green bin. Wrap broken glass carefully.

tin_can.label: Tins & Cans
tin_can.tips: Rinse clean. Squash cans to save space.

foil.label: Aluminium Foil & Foil Trays
foil.tips: Scrunch into a ball - must be clean and free of food.

paper.label: Paper
paper.tips: Put shredded paper in a sealed paper bag so it doesn't blow around.

cardboard.label: Cardboard
cardboard.tips: Flatten boxes. Pizza boxes are fine if not heavily soiled with grease.

crisp_packet.label: Crisp Packets & Snack Wrappers
crisp_packet.tips: Multi-layer packaging cannot be recycled kerbside.

battery.label: Batteries
battery.tips: Never put batteries in any bin - fire risk. Drop off at supermarkets or Portsmouth recycling centre.

electrical_small.label: Small Electrical Items (WEEE)
electrical_small.tips: Take to Portsmouth Household Waste Recycling Centre or electrical retailers with WEEE take-back.

clothing.label: Textiles & Clothing
clothing.tips: Donate good condition items to charity shops. Worn textiles go to recycling centre textile banks.

food_waste.label: Food Waste
food_waste.tips: Portsmouth does not have a separate food waste collection. Home composting is encouraged for veg/fruit.

nappy.label: Nappies & Hygiene Waste
nappy.tips: Wrap securely before placing in the black bin.

aerosol.label: Aerosols
aerosol.tips: Ensure completely empty before recycling. Do not pierce or crush.

metal_scrap.label: Scrap Metal / Large Metal Items
metal_scrap.tips: Take to Portsmouth Household Waste Recycling Centre - scrap metal is accepted.

black.label: Black Bin
black.description: General waste - goes to landfill or energy recovery

recycling_centre.label: Recycling Centre
recycling_centre.description: Portsmouth Household Waste Recycling Centre, Binnacle Way, Portsmouth, PO6 3TQ
